title: Iterate Skill Configuration
description: Schema for iterate.config.yaml used by the iterate-skill AI coding assistant skill.

goal.description: Iteration goal shown in prompts and decision logs.

max_rounds.description: Maximum number of iteration rounds (hard cap 50).

language.description: Output language for prompts and reports.

dimensions.description: Enabled review dimensions. Values are defined in config/dimensions.yaml.

scope.description: changed-only reviews only files changed in the current round; full reviews the whole codebase.

atomic.description: Thresholds used to classify issues as atomic.

max_lines.description: Maximum number of changed lines for an atomic issue.

max_adjacent_methods.description: Maximum number of adjacent similar methods an atomic fix may span.

target_branch.description: Target branch to merge fixes into.

use_worktree.description: Use git worktree instead of a local branch for isolation.

push_per_round.description: Push to remote after every round (true) or only at the end (false).

validation.description: Validation command configuration and safety whitelist.

command_whitelist.description: Command prefixes allowed to run without user confirmation.

commands.description: Per-module validation command lists. Keys are module identifiers; values are shell commands.

output_schema_validation.description: Validate reviewer JSON output against the expected schema and retry on mismatch.
